name: Chocolate Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sifted dry ingredients: cake flour, baking powder, brown sugar, cocoa, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, vanilla extract, and rum.
3. Combine the melted butter with skimmed milk in another bowl.
4. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined.
5. Pour the batter into a preheated waffle iron and cook according to your preferred method.
6. Serve hot and enjoy!
